# VolumeSlider

**Version**: v1.0.0  
**File**: `VolumeSlider.1.0.0.tsx`

Vertical slider; value range **0–100** by default (`min` / `max` optional). The filled region grows **upward** from the bottom using `semanticColors.backdropSurfaceElevatedSurface` (elevated surface). Click anywhere on the track to jump; drag with pointer capture; scroll wheel adjusts (scroll up increases volume, scroll down decreases).

No midpoint snap — 50% is visual only.
